chapter.title: List of Prepositions
chapter.teaser: The following is a thorough (but necessarily incomplete) list of the lexical items that would be classified as prepositions in the CGEL framework. See for details about prepositions and PPs. 3 - à la - a priori - abaft…

passages.heading: List of Prepositions
passages.text:
The following is a thorough (but necessarily incomplete) list of the lexical items that would be classified as prepositions in the CGEL framework. See for details about prepositions and PPs.

3

- a priori

- abaft

- aboard

- about

- above
